creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: portmgr->dim

Grab this PR back again, because there appears to be a rather major bug 
in gcc that manifests itself on amd64 with newer binutils: 

http://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=20218 

I need to get this into the branch (and preferably head) first.
